# Kudbee Quant

> Kudbee Quant is a quantitative trading research platform that combines real-time,
> confidence-scored trade signals, institutional-grade market analytics, and a no-code
> engine to build, backtest, and optimize trading strategies across crypto, equities,
> and forex. It is a research and analytics tool — it does not place trades or provide
> financial advice; the trader always stays in control of execution.

## Key facts

- Name: Kudbee Quant
- Category: Quantitative trading signals, analytics, and backtesting platform
- Audience: Active, systematic, discretionary, and learning traders
- Coding required: None — the strategy builder is fully visual / no-code
- Markets: Cryptocurrencies, equities, and forex (rolling out)
- Status: Private beta with an open early-access waitlist (free to join)
- Not financial advice; trading involves substantial risk of loss

## What it does

- Real-time signals: confidence-scored long / short / exit calls with plain-English reasoning
- Analytics: Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, win rate, exposure, and market-regime detection
- No-code strategy builder: compose strategies from indicators, filters, and risk rules
- Backtesting: tick-accurate historical replay modeling fees, slippage, and funding, with
  walk-forward, out-of-sample, and Monte Carlo validation

## How it works (four steps)

1. Connect your markets (crypto, equities, or forex)
2. Build a strategy from a template or from scratch in the visual builder
3. Backtest and optimize against historical data
4. Receive real-time, confidence-scored signals from your validated strategy
